title: Looping Jukebox
description: The jukebox will loop its song after finished instead of just playing it once.
body:
All jukebox blocks will work the same as before, but after the song is finished

instead of playing it only once, it will restart the song

going into an infinite loop, until the disc gets taken out.

 

Because of this the jukebox can be used as an infinite energy source for your redstone powered tools.

The mod does not change anything else

so you will only hear the song when you are near the jukebox block.

 

Mod Currently Supports:

**Forge 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**
